utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: needs physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan includes both physical (€45/month) and mental (€30/month) and a total (€75/month). Fully specified.
- property_coverage: needs home/contents insurance with costs. Plan provides description and a monthly cost (€55/month). It mentions home content protection; cost included. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: needs travel insurance with costs. Plan provides description and monthly cost (€20/month). Fully specified.
- additional_services: needs any enhancement services with costs. Plan provides a described add-on and monthly cost (€15/month). Fully specified.
- total_budget: needs complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides monthly (€165/month) and annual (€1980/year). Fully specified.
All 5 items are present and include the required cost details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to map each item from the final coverage plan to the exact item names and ratings in the ground-truth. The final plan includes: 'SecureLife Basic Plans for physical and mental coverage' at €45 and €30. For health, 'SecureLife Basic Plan' exists in both physical_health (rating 4) and mental_health (rating 8). Property coverage: 'HomeFirst Standard Coverage' matches 'HomeFirst Standard Coverage' under home_content (rating 9). Travel coverage: 'SecureLife Basic Travel Plan' corresponds to 'SecureLife Basic Plan' under travel_insurance (rating 4). Additional services: 'Professional Liability / Professional Indemnity add-on' has no direct match in ground-truth ratings; thus it cannot be mapped and should be omitted from RATINGS.
